reason_to_test: stiff hardwood baseline for pin-bearing and low creep
required_evidence: actual stock dimensions grain direction moisture content and coupon load test
risk_if_wrong: neck lean pin creep or joint failure
next_step: Select local stock and record moisture before CAD section review.

candidate_material: quality Baltic birch or shop-made hardwood laminate
reason_to_test: dimensional stability and predictable section strength
required_evidence: lamination schedule adhesive data and bend/creep coupon
next_step: Build small laminated beam coupon before final frame decision.

candidate_material: spruce cedar or thin birch ply
required_evidence: thickness grain direction bridge-footprint coupon and crown delta
risk_if_wrong: bridge lift cracking weak volume or unstable crown
next_step: Run bridge-footprint coupon after bridge angle is reviewed.

candidate_material: hard maple ebony or dense fruitwood
reason_to_test: wear resistance at bearing line and clean string release
required_evidence: bearing-surface polish test string abrasion check and radius record
risk_if_wrong: string breakage buzzing or rapid groove wear
next_step: Prototype bearing samples with selected strings.

candidate_material: zither or harp tuning pins from named supplier
required_evidence: supplier SKU shank diameter pilot recommendation and pin-rail coupon
risk_if_wrong: pin slip rail split or unsafe sudden release
next_step: Choose supplier before drilling any mule rail.

candidate_material: harp pins eyelets or rated hardware
required_evidence: supplier rating and shielded pull-test coupon
next_step: Run pull-test coupon before first full stringing.

candidate_material: nylon fluorocarbon gut brass bronze or steel
required_evidence: unit weight supplier limit diameter and break-load data for each row
risk_if_wrong: wrong tension unsafe load or poor tuning stability
next_step: Fill tension-study.csv from supplier chart or measured unit weight.

candidate_material: shellac oil varnish hide glue aliphatic resin or epoxy
reason_to_test: compatibility with string load and soundboard movement
required_evidence: material safety data cure schedule and coupon behavior
risk_if_wrong: joint creep finish damping or unsafe handling
next_step: Keep finish out of load-bearing assumptions until tested.
